_comment: Per-topology DRC violation ceilings. 'errors' counts categories that rule_severities marks as errors (clearance, courtyards_overlap, drill_out_of_range, shorting_items, solder_mask_bridge, unconnected_items, etc.). 'warnings' counts the rest (silk_* mostly). track_dangling and via_dangling are ignored because Freerouting produces them nondeterministically. Lower as fixes land — never raise without a written reason.
_baseline_context: Post-fix state after commits 6dde53f + 12a7f60 + 57d33b3. All four demo boards are 0-error; only silk-layer aesthetic warnings remain.

buck_12v_to_5v.notes: Clean on errors. 1 silk_overlap warning: R1/R2 reference text touching. Aesthetic, not blocking.

ldo_5v_to_3v3.notes: Fully DRC-clean. Maintain as zero-tolerance baseline.

esp32c3_breakout.notes: Clean on errors. 2 silk_edge_clearance warnings: U1 module silkscreen runs past the board edge. Aesthetic, not blocking — fix by trimming module silk or growing the board margin.

led_5v_20ma.notes: Fully DRC-clean. Maintain as zero-tolerance baseline.
